basic_details.job_title: NID Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Faculty, Senior Accounts Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Design (NID) Various Design and Administrative Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 18 June 2026 on the official website https://www.nid.edu. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced through the NID Various Design and Administrative Posts Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Design, Bachelor’s Degree/Diploma in Design, Master degree in Commerce/Financial Management, Bachelor’s Degree in Library Science/Information Science, Bachelor’s degree, Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Engineering/Design/Fashion/Apparel, 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in Design/Engineering
qualification.details: Principal Designer: Post Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Design from a recognized University/reputed Institution. Desirable: Doctorate in Design. Minimum 10 years in relevant field of Design. Faculty: Bachelor’s Degree/Diploma in Design (after 10+2 and of not less than 03 years duration) from the recognized University/reputed Institution. Desirable: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Design. Minimum 5 years in relevant field of Design. Senior Accounts Officer: Master degree in Commerce/Financial Management from recognized University/Institution/C.A or equivalent. Minimum of 5 years relevant experience in Govt./Educational/ Research Institution. Senior Assistant Librarian: Bachelor’s Degree in Library Science/Information Science from a recognized University. Five years’ service as Assistant Librarian in a recognized Institution in the Pay Matrix Level-6 or equivalent. Assistant: Bachelor’s degree from a recognized University/Institution. Computer Knowledge. Associate Senior Technical Instructor: Bachelor’s Degree or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant Engineering/Design subject from a recognized institution. Post qualification experience of Four years (Degree) or six years (Diploma). Associate Senior Design Instructor: Bachelor’s Degree or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant Engineering/Design subject from a recognized institution. Post qualification experience of Four years (Degree) or six years (Diploma). Design Instructor: 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in relevant Design subject from a recognized institution with post qualification experience of Four years (Diploma) or two years (Degree). Technical Instructor: 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in relevant Design subject from a recognized institution with post qualification experience of Four years (Diploma) or two years (Degree). Technical Assistant: 01 year Certificate Course (CTS) after SSC from ITI or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant subject from a recognized institution with Minimum Four years (Certificate) or two years (Diploma) post qualification work experience.

salary_details.details: Principal Designer: Pay Level 13 Faculty: Pay Level 10 Senior Accounts Officer: Pay Level 10 Senior Assistant Librarian: Pay Level 7 Assistant: Pay Level 4 Associate Senior Technical Instructor: Pay Level 7 Associate Senior Design Instructor: Pay Level 7 Design Instructor: Pay Level 6 Technical Instructor: Pay Level 6 Technical Assistant: Pay Level 5

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test Skill Test Presentation/Demonstration Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NID to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_design: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Design, Bachelor’s Degree/Diploma in Design, Master degree in Commerce/Financial Management, Bachelor’s Degree in Library Science/Information Science, Bachelor’s degree, Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Engineering/Design/Fashion/Apparel, 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in Design/Engineering

content_sections.heading: NID Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NID Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NID Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Principal Designer: Post Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Design from a recognized University/reputed Institution. Desirable: Doctorate in Design. Minimum 10 years in relevant field of Design. Faculty: Bachelor’s Degree/Diploma in Design (after 10+2 and of not less than 03 years duration) from the recognized University/reputed Institution. Desirable: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Design. Minimum 5 years in relevant field of Design. Senior Accounts Officer: Master degree in Commerce/Financial Management from recognized University/Institution/C.A or equivalent. Minimum of 5 years relevant experience in Govt./Educational/ Research Institution. Senior Assistant Librarian: Bachelor’s Degree in Library Science/Information Science from a recognized University. Five years’ service as Assistant Librarian in a recognized Institution in the Pay Matrix Level-6 or equivalent. Assistant: Bachelor’s degree from a recognized University/Institution. Computer Knowledge. Associate Senior Technical Instructor: Bachelor’s Degree or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant Engineering/Design subject from a recognized institution. Post qualification experience of Four years (Degree) or six years (Diploma). Associate Senior Design Instructor: Bachelor’s Degree or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant Engineering/Design subject from a recognized institution. Post qualification experience of Four years (Degree) or six years (Diploma). Design Instructor: 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in relevant Design subject from a recognized institution with post qualification experience of Four years (Diploma) or two years (Degree). Technical Instructor: 3 Years Diploma after SSC or Bachelor’s Degree in relevant Design subject from a recognized institution with post qualification experience of Four years (Diploma) or two years (Degree). Technical Assistant: 01 year Certificate Course (CTS) after SSC from ITI or 03 years Diploma after 10th in relevant subject from a recognized institution with Minimum Four years (Certificate) or two years (Diploma) post qualification work experience.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Principal Designer: Pay Level 13 Faculty: Pay Level 10 Senior Accounts Officer: Pay Level 10 Senior Assistant Librarian: Pay Level 7 Assistant: Pay Level 4 Associate Senior Technical Instructor: Pay Level 7 Associate Senior Design Instructor: Pay Level 7 Design Instructor: Pay Level 6 Technical Instructor: Pay Level 6 Technical Assistant: Pay Level 5

rows.event: Last Date for Online Application (45 days from notification)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting Written Test Skill Test Presentation/Demonstration Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NID to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NID recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NID recruitment is 02 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NID recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies for Various Design and Administrative Posts in the National Institute of Design.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NID jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for NID recruitment is strictly Online.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure for the selected candidates ranges from Pay Level 4 to Pay Level 13, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for NID posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post and include degrees/diplomas in Design, Commerce, Library Science, Engineering, and other related fields.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates for NID recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NID recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Shortlisting, Written Test, Skill Test, Presentation/Demonstration, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official NID recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The official NID recruitment notification can be found on the NID website and is also linked in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these NID posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these NID posts is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is this NID recruitment for?
faq.answer: This NID recruitment is for Andhra Pradesh.
